ALVAI Clinical Decision Engine · Prichard

Tell ALVAI what you're experiencing. One clear protocol. No generic advice. No options list. One path.

ALVAI will respond with: State → Root Cause → Protocol → Start Tonight → Day 7 Check-in.
How ALVAI Resolves (Not Responds)
STATE — What you're experiencing. Specific to you.
ROOT CAUSE — 1–2 biological drivers. Ranked. No speculation.
PROTOCOL — 3–5 exact steps with timing. No overwhelm.
EXECUTION — One CTA. One path. Everything pre-selected.
NEXT TRIGGER — Day 7 check-in. We adjust if it didn't work.
Dr. Felicia Stoler DCN, RDN, FACSM — clinical authority on every output
Clinical Protocol Library · Prichard

10 protocols. Every condition. 30-day bundles sourced through Dr. Felicia's Fullscript dispensary. No SKUs — protocols only.

Sleep Reset Protocol
Magnesium glycinate + L-theanine + Melatonin (low)
$39–$69 · 30 days
Start Sleep Protocol
Cortisol + Stress Protocol
Magnesium bisglycinate + Ashwagandha + L-theanine
$45–$75 · 30 days
Start Cortisol Protocol
Gut Reset Protocol
Probiotic + L-glutamine + Digestive enzymes
$49–$79 · 30 days
Start Gut Protocol
Energy + Fatigue Protocol
B-complex + CoQ10 + Iron (conditional)
$35–$59 · 30 days
Start Energy Protocol
Immune Resilience Protocol
Vitamin C + Zinc + Quercetin
$29–$49 · 30 days
Start Immune Protocol
Cognitive Focus Protocol
Lion's Mane + Bacopa + Phosphatidylserine
$55–$85 · 30 days
Start Cognitive Protocol
Hormonal Support Protocol
D3+K2 + Magnesium + B6
$39–$65 · 30 days
Start Hormonal Protocol
Movement Recovery Protocol
Creatine + Electrolytes + Collagen
$45–$75 · 30 days
Start Movement Protocol
Longevity Core Protocol
NMN/NR + Resveratrol + Omega-3
$79–$129 · 30 days
Start Longevity Protocol
Mood Stabilization Protocol
5-HTP + SAMe + B-complex
$49–$79 · 30 days
Start Mood Protocol

Sleep Intelligence · Prichard

Log your sleep data. ALVAI responds to your specific numbers — not population averages.

Sleep Log
Sleep Reset Protocol — 30 Day
8:30pmMagnesium glycinate 300–400mg
9:00pmReduce light + screens
9:30pmL-theanine 200mg
BedtimeMelatonin 0.5mg if needed night 3+
Day 7ALVAI outcome check-in — we adjust
Start Sleep Protocol

Drug + Supplement Interaction Check · 302K Pairs

CYP450/UGT/P-gp metabolic pathway data. Cannabis intelligence (VERDE/ECSIQ framework). Check before you take anything.

ALVAI checks your specific combination against 302,000 verified drug interaction pairs and CYP450 metabolic pathways. ChatGPT gives general warnings. BLEU checks you specifically.

Built and ready for pilot deployment. Employers in Prichard can enroll their workforce. Employees get BLEU free. Employer gets aggregate health intelligence — never individual data.

Every step in Prichard feeds Jazz Bird's causal research. Your outcomes help the next person in Prichard get a better protocol.

Earn coins for steps. Influencer program unlocks at 20 installs.

Walking converts to Jazz Bird research donations. ${city.name} walking challenge.
Free

Enroll in research studies. $25–150 per participant. Funds Jazz Bird science.

Prichard Jazz Bird Data Point

Every BLEU user in Prichard who completes a 30-day protocol and checks in on Day 7 creates a causal data point for Jazz Bird's research. Your outcome is the evidence that gets the next grant funded.

Health Context · Alabama

Among lowest health outcomes nationally. Black Belt counties face extreme rural health deserts.

📞 988
Suicide and Crisis Lifeline · Call or Text · Available 24/7 · BLEU Safety Shield response under 800ms
Substance Use Recovery
→ SAMHSA Helpline: 1-800-662-4357
→ Local AA/NA meeting finder
→ Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT)
→ Harm reduction services near ${city.name}
→ BLEU Metamorphosis Model protocol
Mental Health Bridge
→ Brightside — online psychiatry
→ Done — ADHD care
→ BetterHelp — therapy matching
→ Alvai — AI therapy interface
→ Community Mental Health Centers ${city.name}

Jazz Bird 501(c)(3) maintains zero ad revenue. No advertiser pays for recommendation placement. All affiliate relationships are disclosed here. Clinical recommendations come first — affiliate links are added only where they serve the recommendation.
